member.name: T:GBPStack.CapabilitiesNegotiator
member.summary: Per-member capability advertisement plus intersection / union queries for negotiating optional features (codecs, extensions, version flags).

member.name: M:GBPStack.CapabilitiesNegotiator.Advertise(System.UInt32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Records an advertisement (replaces any prior one).

member.name: M:GBPStack.CapabilitiesNegotiator.Forget(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Removes a member's advertisement.

member.name: M:GBPStack.CapabilitiesNegotiator.CapabilitiesOf(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns the current advertisement for .

member.name: M:GBPStack.CapabilitiesNegotiator.GroupSupports(System.String)
member.summary: True if every advertised member supports .

member.name: M:GBPStack.CapabilitiesNegotiator.Intersection
member.summary: Intersection — capabilities every member advertises (safe-to-use set).

member.name: M:GBPStack.CapabilitiesNegotiator.Union
member.summary: Union — every capability advertised by any member.

member.name: M:GBPStack.CapabilitiesNegotiator.Missing(System.String)
member.summary: Members that did not advertise .

member.name: P:GBPStack.CapabilitiesNegotiator.Count
member.summary: Number of members that advertised something.

member.name: T:GBPStack.GapClient
member.summary: Group Audio Protocol client. Maintains a per-source rtp_sequence window and validates key_phase against the current group epoch.

member.name: P:GBPStack.GapClient.Handle
member.summary: Native handle.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GapClient.Create
member.summary: Creates a new GAP client.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GapClient.Send(GBPStack.GroupNode,GBPStack.MlsContext,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sends an Opus frame.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GapClient.Accept(System.Byte[],System.UInt64)
member.summary: Accepts a plaintext payload delivered by the GBP layer.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GapClient.Reset
member.summary: Clears the replay window. Intended for use after an epoch change.

member.name: T:GBPStack.GapAcceptResult
member.summary: Outcome of .

member.name: M:GBPStack.GapAcceptResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{System.UInt32},System.Nullable{System.UInt32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Outcome of .

member.name: T:GBPStack.ControlOpcode
member.summary: Control plane opcode registry.

member.name: T:GBPStack.NodeState
member.summary: Node FSM state.

member.name: T:GBPStack.StreamType
member.summary: Stream class.

member.name: T:GBPStack.OutboundFrame
member.summary: An outbound wire frame: target member and the serialised bytes.

member.name: M:GBPStack.OutboundFrame.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: An outbound wire frame: target member and the serialised bytes.

member.name: T:GBPStack.GroupNode
member.summary: Managed wrapper around the GBP-layer node. Owns the framing, AEAD, replay window, FSM and control plane. Sub-protocol semantics live in , and .

member.name: P:GBPStack.GroupNode.Handle
member.summary: Native handle.

member.name: P:GBPStack.GroupNode.MemberId
member.summary: This node's member id.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GroupNode.Create(System.UInt32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates a node with the given member id and 16-byte group id.

member.name: P:GBPStack.GroupNode.State
member.summary: Current node FSM state.

member.name: P:GBPStack.GroupNode.Epoch
member.summary: Current node epoch.

member.name: P:GBPStack.GroupNode.LastTransitionId
member.summary: Last applied transition_id.

member.name: P:GBPStack.GroupNode.GroupId
member.summary: Group identifier (a copy of the 16-byte array).

member.name: M:GBPStack.GroupNode.BootstrapAsCreator(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Drives the node from IDLE to ACTIVE as a creator.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GroupNode.BootstrapAsJoiner(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Drives the node from IDLE to ACTIVE as a joiner.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GroupNode.SetEpochForTesting(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Forces the node's current_epoch (intended for tests of late peers).

member.name: M:GBPStack.GroupNode.ApplyTransition(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Applies an epoch transition locally.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GroupNode.SendControl(GBPStack.MlsContext,System.UInt32,GBPStack.ControlOpcode,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sends a control plane message on Stream 0.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GroupNode.OnWire(GBPStack.MlsContext,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Feeds wire bytes to the node and returns the resulting events.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GroupNode.DrainEvents
member.summary: Drains queued events without consuming any wire bytes.

member.name: T:GBPStack.NodeEvent
member.summary: Event surfaced by the GBP layer.
Event surfaced by the GBP layer.

member.name: T:GBPStack.SignalType
member.summary: GSP signal type registry.

member.name: T:GBPStack.GspClient
member.summary: Group Signaling Protocol client. Tracks request_id deduplication and exposes accepted signals to the application.

member.name: P:GBPStack.GspClient.Handle
member.summary: Native handle.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GspClient.Create
member.summary: Creates a new GSP client.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GspClient.Send(GBPStack.GroupNode,GBPStack.MlsContext,System.UInt32,GBPStack.SignalType,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Sends a signal.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GspClient.Accept(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Accepts a plaintext payload delivered by the GBP layer.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GspClient.Reset
member.summary: Clears the request-id deduplication set. Intended for use after an epoch change.

member.name: T:GBPStack.GspAcceptResult
member.summary: Outcome of .

member.name: M:GBPStack.GspAcceptResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{GBPStack.SignalType},System.Nullable{System.UInt32},System.Nullable{System.UInt32},System.Nullable{System.UInt32},System.String)
member.summary: Outcome of .

member.name: T:GBPStack.GtpClient
member.summary: Group Text Protocol client. Tracks idempotency by (sender_id, message_id).

member.name: P:GBPStack.GtpClient.Handle
member.summary: Native handle.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GtpClient.Create
member.summary: Creates a new GTP client.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GtpClient.Send(GBPStack.GroupNode,GBPStack.MlsContext,System.UInt32,System.UInt64,System.String)
member.summary: Sends a text message to .

member.name: M:GBPStack.GtpClient.Accept(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Accepts a plaintext payload delivered by the GBP layer.

member.name: M:GBPStack.GtpClient.Reset
member.summary: Clears the idempotency state. Intended for use after an epoch change.

member.name: T:GBPStack.GtpAcceptResult
member.summary: Outcome of .

member.name: M:GBPStack.GtpAcceptResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Nullable{System.UInt32},System.Nullable{System.UInt64},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Outcome of .

member.name: T:GBPStack.AudioFrame
member.summary: One frame held by .

member.name: M:GBPStack.AudioFrame.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: One frame held by .

member.name: T:GBPStack.JitterPushOutcome
member.summary: Outcome of .

member.name: F:GBPStack.JitterPushOutcome.Accepted
member.summary: Buffered successfully.

member.name: F:GBPStack.JitterPushOutcome.Late
member.summary: Dropped — older than the next-expected sequence.

member.name: F:GBPStack.JitterPushOutcome.Evicted
member.summary: Buffered, evicting the oldest queued frame to make room.

member.name: T:GBPStack.JitterPushResult
member.summary: Result returned by .

member.name: M:GBPStack.JitterPushResult.#ctor(GBPStack.JitterPushOutcome,GBPStack.AudioFrame)
member.summary: Result returned by .

member.name: T:GBPStack.JitterBuffer
member.summary: Bounded reorder window for GAP audio frames. Hold them briefly so the decoder consumes them in rtp_sequence order, drop late arrivals.

member.name: M:GBPStack.JitterBuffer.Push(GBPStack.AudioFrame)
member.summary: Inserts a frame.

member.name: M:GBPStack.JitterBuffer.PopInOrder(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Pops the next frame in order, or null if the head is from the future.

member.name: M:GBPStack.JitterBuffer.PopForce(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Pops the next frame regardless of contiguity (skips gaps).

member.name: M:GBPStack.JitterBuffer.LengthFor(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Number of frames buffered for .

member.name: M:GBPStack.JitterBuffer.Clear
member.summary: Drops every queued frame.

member.name: T:GBPStack.MessageEntry
member.summary: One entry in .

member.name: M:GBPStack.MessageEntry.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.UInt64,System.String)
member.summary: One entry in .

member.name: T:GBPStack.MessageHistory
member.summary: Bounded ring-buffer of recent GTP messages. Used for serving resync requests from re-joining peers.

member.name: P:GBPStack.MessageHistory.Count
member.summary: Number of messages currently buffered.

member.name: M:GBPStack.MessageHistory.Push(GBPStack.MessageEntry)
member.summary: Records a message. Returns true if newly added.

member.name: M:GBPStack.MessageHistory.Contains(System.UInt32,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Returns true if (senderId, messageId) is present.

member.name: M:GBPStack.MessageHistory.Since(GBPStack.Watermark)
member.summary: Returns every message produced after the given watermark.

member.name: M:GBPStack.MessageHistory.SinceForSender(System.UInt32,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Returns messages from a single sender newer than .

member.name: M:GBPStack.MessageHistory.Clear
member.summary: Drops every message in the buffer.

member.name: T:GBPStack.Watermark
member.summary: Per-sender high-water mark of accepted GTP message_ids.

member.name: M:GBPStack.Watermark.Observe(System.UInt32,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Records that from has been observed.

member.name: M:GBPStack.Watermark.LastSeen(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Last seen message_id from , or null.

member.name: M:GBPStack.Watermark.Snapshot
member.summary: Iterates every known sender with its last message_id.

member.name: M:GBPStack.Watermark.Clear
member.summary: Drops every entry.

member.name: T:GBPStack.MlsContext
member.summary: Managed wrapper around an MLS (RFC 9420) context owned by the native library. Owns a single-member group plus a published KeyPackage that can be used to invite this member into another group.

member.name: P:GBPStack.MlsContext.Handle
member.summary: Native handle.

member.name: P:GBPStack.MlsContext.Identity
member.summary: Application-level identity.

member.name: M:GBPStack.MlsContext.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a fresh MLS context.

member.name: P:GBPStack.MlsContext.Epoch
member.summary: Returns the current group epoch.

member.name: P:GBPStack.MlsContext.GroupId
member.summary: Returns the 16-byte group identifier.

member.name: M:GBPStack.MlsContext.ExportKeyPackage
member.summary: Exports the TLS-serialised KeyPackage of this member.

member.name: M:GBPStack.MlsContext.Invite(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Invites the given KeyPackage into the local group; returns the Welcome bytes.

member.name: M:GBPStack.MlsContext.AcceptWelcome(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Replaces the local group with the one described by the Welcome.

member.name: T:GBPStack.Native
member.summary: P/Invoke surface over the native gbp_stack shared library (cdylib produced by the gbp-stack-ffi Rust crate).

member.name: T:GBPStack.Native.GbpBuffer
member.summary: FFI buffer triple (ptr, len, cap). Released via .

member.name: T:GBPStack.Permissions
member.summary: Application-defined permission bits for GSP roles.

member.name: T:GBPStack.RoleSpec
member.summary: Role definition in .

member.name: M:GBPStack.RoleSpec.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.String,GBPStack.Permissions)
member.summary: Role definition in .

member.name: T:GBPStack.RoleException
member.summary: Errors thrown by .

member.name: T:GBPStack.RoleRegistry
member.summary: Bidirectional mapping of role ids to s plus an assignment table tracking each member's current role.

member.name: M:GBPStack.RoleRegistry.Define(GBPStack.RoleSpec)
member.summary: Registers a role (replaces any existing one with the same id).

member.name: M:GBPStack.RoleRegistry.DefineRole(System.UInt32,System.String,GBPStack.Permissions)
member.summary: Convenience: defines a role from primitive components.

member.name: M:GBPStack.RoleRegistry.Role(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Looks up a role by id.

member.name: P:GBPStack.RoleRegistry.Roles
member.summary: Iterates every defined role.

member.name: M:GBPStack.RoleRegistry.Assign(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Assigns a role to a member.

member.name: M:GBPStack.RoleRegistry.RoleOf(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns the role currently assigned to , if any.

member.name: M:GBPStack.RoleRegistry.PermissionsOf(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Effective permissions of (None if unassigned).

member.name: M:GBPStack.RoleRegistry.Require(System.UInt32,GBPStack.Permissions)
member.summary: Throws if the member lacks the required permissions.

member.name: M:GBPStack.RoleRegistry.Has(System.UInt32,GBPStack.Permissions)
member.summary: Returns true when the member has every bit in .
